China HR & Payroll Guide Remix (2026)

Side-by-side comparison: original China Briefing guide pages vs newly rewritten remix pages.

Original Article (China Briefing) Rewritten Remix Article (Published Here)
Labor Laws in China China Labor Law Guide for Foreign Employers (2026 Update)
Hiring Employees in China Hiring Employees in China: 2026 Practical Guide for Foreign Companies
Visa and Employment Permits China Visas and Work Permits in 2026: Employer Playbook
Employee Handbook in China China Employee Handbook Compliance: 2026 Drafting and Implementation Guide
Recruitment in China Recruitment in China: 2026 Strategies for Foreign Employers
Terminating Employees in China Terminating Employees in China: 2026 Compliance Checklist for Employers
China Public Holidays China Public Holidays and Leave Management: 2026 Employer Guide
Minimum Wage in China China Minimum Wage Compliance in 2026: Multi-City Employer Guide
Social Average Salary in China Social Average Salary in China: Why It Matters for Employer Planning in 2026
Social Insurance in China China Social Insurance in 2026: Employer Contribution and Compliance Guide

Next step planned: expand each remix article to long-form depth (closer to original article length) with richer examples and jurisdiction notes.
